title: Summary: Turn 28
content: Pueblo 0.1.0 is a TypeScript code agent framework with CLI-first + Electron desktop architecture, featuring a layered input routing (CLI → dispatcher/agent → LLM providers → tools → SQLite persistence) and built-in semantic memory (Pepe) with embedding/retrieval. Core modules: `agent/`, `cli/`, `commands/`, `desktop/` (Electron three-layer), `memory/`, `persistence/`, `providers/`, `tools/`, with entry points at `cli/index.ts` and `desktop/main.ts`.
